content: {"winner": "A", "reason": "Piece A uses more engaging, age-appropriate language with vivid comparisons (vacuum cleaner, magnet) and maintains an enthusiastic, conversational tone that connects better with an 8-year-old, while Piece B is more technical, dense, and reads like a textbook with concepts (singularity, matter squeezed into no size) that are too abstract for the target audience."}
